---
title: "ANN"
author: "Steven Liu"
date: "TO414 HW 4"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: cerulean
    toc: yes
    toc_float:
      collapsed: true
---

<div style="padding: 15px; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-left: 5px solid #ccc;">
[Back to MainReportHW4.html](MainReportHW4.html#overviewofmodels)
</div>


# import data

```{r}
train <- readRDS("train_dummy.rds")
test <- readRDS("test_dummy.rds")

str(train)
str(test)
```

# build model

```{r, cache=TRUE}
library(neuralnet)

ann_model <- neuralnet(
  formula = is_canceled ~ .,
  data = train,

  hidden = c(5, 2),
  stepmax = 1e8,
  lifesign = "full")
plot(ann_model)

saveRDS(ann_model, file = "ann.rds")

```


<div style="padding: 15px; background-color: #f9f9f9; border-left: 5px solid #ccc;">
[Back to MainReportHW4.html](MainReportHW4.html#overviewofmodels)
</div>
